jepa_identity: Uses ProgramBootstrapJEPA online RNA/image encoders, EMA RNA/image target encoders, stop-gradient latent teachers, query-conditioned RNA->image, image->RNA, and control+action transition predictors, cross-modal JEPA losses, and action-conditioned transition losses.
leakage_controls: F080 uses train-only control expression centroids as source state and train-only control image PCA centroids as source teachers. Training target image-PCA teachers are train-only condition centroids. Actions are coarse program one-hot descriptors only, with fewer columns than perturbations. Eval target expression/images are used only for scoring. No condition_key, biological_key, exact perturbation one-hot, eval target means, or pooled train+test statistics are model inputs.
